cases.observation: The plugin mention created a Work chat, but the response used a separately connected Canonical Memories source and stated that the independent verifier capability was unavailable.
A self-contained request to run the bundled authority-replay demo returned only an inability response instead of deterministic verifier output.

The runtime reported canonical-memory-verifier@openai-curated-remote as not installed and said bundled skill instructions were not exposed, even though the directory UI showed the plugin installed and displayed the complete skill instructions.

claim_boundary: Directory publication, listing, installation, and visible skill metadata are established. Runtime usability is not established. The observed mismatch may be propagation or platform behavior; this record does not assign a root cause.
